item.description:
New:
  • Reorder and hide client tabs. Drag providers into your preferred order in Settings and uncheck the ones you don't use; a hidden client vanishes from every number — tab bar, Overview totals, charts, menu-bar title and live rate, every report — and unhiding restores it instantly. Thanks @savourylie (#28).
  • Hide the Agent limits card: a master switch, plus per-client toggles that keep the tab and its numbers. Useful for accounts with usage but no OAuth quota, like Claude Console. Thanks @yiskang (#33, #34).
Fixes:
  • Dropped the phantom "" row from the Claude model breakdown — locally-fabricated zero-token turns; your totals are unchanged. Thanks @starburst3190 (#30).
  • Hourly and Agents now filter per client in the core engine, so a single client's tab no longer shows whole-bucket totals for hours or agents it shares with other clients.
  • Token sums saturate instead of overflowing on corrupt data.

Thanks: @savourylie, @starburst3190, @yiskang

Fixes:
  • TokenBar no longer breaks your Claude Code login. It was refreshing Claude's OAuth token but never saving the rotated token back to the shared store, so your next `claude` command could hit an expired token and force a re-login; the refreshed token is now persisted (Keychain or credentials file). Fixes #4 / #25.
  • Restored the Codex (OpenAI) menu-bar icon to its ChatGPT-green mark; the v1.2.0 icon refresh had swapped in a muddy black outline.

Thanks: @starburst3190

New:
  • Claude limits now work with setup-token / CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN. When the usage endpoint is scope-blocked (403 user:profile), TokenBar reads your Session (5h) and Weekly (7d) windows from Anthropic's rate-limit response headers, and picks the token up from your environment or Keychain. Thanks @sayre4ux (#26).
Accuracy — parsing engine caught up to tokscale v4.0.7:
  • MiMo Code usage now parses at all (it was reading empty).
  • Codex: fixed a ~50% token under-count on same-millisecond forks.
  • GitHub Copilot: sub-agents are now attributed separately instead of collapsing into one bucket.
  • Recovered dropped spend for gjc and Pi (messages with no provider field were skipped).
  • Fixed provider bucketing and pricing across OpenCode, Kilo, Mux, Antigravity and Jcode.
  • fable-5 is now priced correctly instead of resolving to "unknown".
  • More accurate "active days" and average-per-day.
Fixes:
  • Refreshed every agent brand icon: fixed 4 wrong and 2 broken ones, and added marks for 8 that showed a plain letter disc.
  • Homebrew: silenced the depends_on macos: deprecation warning. Thanks @yiskang (#23).

Fixes:
  • Reopening the dashboard now reliably shows the correct data: it keeps your selected year, no longer shows a previous year's numbers, and keeps the live activity and quota cards populated.

Fixes:
  • Dashboard no longer flashes a loading indicator each time you open the popover

New:
  • Brand logos for the Cline, jcode, MiMo Code, and gjc tabs, instead of a letter badge.
Improved:
  • The client-tab row now scrolls with a plain vertical mouse wheel, so a mouse without a horizontal-scroll wheel can reach every tab.
Fixes:
  • Antigravity CLI now shows the shared Antigravity quota instead of an empty or duplicate limit card.

New:
  • Tracks five more local AI coding tools: Cline, Antigravity CLI, jcode, MiMo Code, and gjc.
Improved:
  • More accurate cost and per-tool attribution across AI token usage.
  • Corrected Codex usage counts for forked and sub-agent sessions.
  • Antigravity CLI usage is now dated per turn, so the live view and daily totals reflect when each turn actually happened.
Fixes:
  • The app no longer crashes if the usage parser hits an unexpected error.
  • More reliable live usage updates, including for the newly added tools.
